summary: Pass. The fix commit (217576e0) directly addresses the prior blocking issue from fix-critical-logic-bugs by moving HUD initialization to occur after cwd resolution and passing the resolved cwd into initializeHUDState(cwd). The added regression test in watch-mode-init verifies the callsite now receives the resolved directory. Review included both the original feature diff (bf83e9d6) and the fix diff (217576e0).
